method: explicit two-ancilla oracle: A_f -> U_theta -> CCZ(f,a) -> U_theta^dagger -> A_f^dagger

registers.f: feasibility ancilla, computed by exact Boolean physical-constraint oracle
registers.a: value ancilla, rotated by the VQC value-function threshold module

oracle_sequence: CCZ(f,a) flips phase only when f=1 and a=1
U_theta^dagger uncomputes the value ancilla approximately
A_f^dagger uncomputes the feasibility ancilla exactly

full_order_reference.note: Full Boolean interpolation can make the explicit two-ancilla oracle exact, but the feature count is exponential.
